slides.eyebrow: Ḓivhazwakale ya Giredi ya vhu-11 - Zwikhala zwa FET
slides.title: Mihumbulo ya Mutupo kha Vhufhelo ha Ḓ ana ḽa vhu-19 na ḽa vhu-20
slides.lead: Nḓila ye Vhaeuropa vha bveledza ngayo saintsi ya mazwifhi ya 'mutupo', na nḓila ye yeneyo mihumbulo ya shandukiselwa ngayo kha milayo, muvhuso wa mavu na, mafheleloni, u vhulahwa ha vhathu vhanzhi.

media.alt: Zwishumiswa zwivhili zwa u ela zwo vhewaho nṱha ha tshifhaṱuwo tsha muthu, zwi tshi sumbedza saintsi ya mazwifhi ya u ela mutupo.

slides.notes: Thomani nga u ita uri khoro khulwane ya thero yoṱhe i vhonale khagala: 'mutupo' a si ngoho ya biological, ndi muhumbulo wa matshilisano na wa politiki we wa vhumbiwa nga vhathu, kanzhi u itela u pfumbudza maanḓa na u sa lingana. Sumbedzani muhala wa ngudo yoṱhe - u kevha, ha ḓi tevhela pseudo-saintsi (Social Darwinism, eugenics), nga murahu mbekanyamaitele na khakhathi (u vhulahwa ha vhathu nga vhukoloni, Germany ya Nazi, na vhukwamani na Afurika Tshipembe). Vhewani mbudziso ya u ṱ ola ya level ya FET: mihumbulo i shanduka hani i tshi vha mvelelo?

slides.title: Ri amba mini nga 'mutupo'?
slides.lead: Saintsi ya musalauno i tenda uri a hu na mutheo wa biological wa u kwevha vhathu u vha 'mitupo' yo fhambanaho.

blocks.text: **Mutupo** ndi nḓila ya u kuvhanganya vhathu nga zwiimo zwa muvhili sa muvhala wa lukanda. Zwi nga vhonala zwo tea, fhedzi ndi **tshivhumbiwa tsha matshilisano** - muhumbulo wo vhumbiwaho nga zwitshavha, hu si ngoho i wanaho kha biology. Vhathu vha shara u fhira 99.9% dza DNA yavho, nahone hu na phambano ya genetic nnzhi *nga ngomu* ha tshigwada tshinwe na tshinwe tshi vhidzwaho tsha mutupo u fhira *vhukati* ha zwigwada.

items: **Ludzunzu lwa mutupo** ndi u tenda uri zwenezwi zwigwada zwi nga kwevhiwa nga ndondo, zwinwe zwi 'zwihulwane' u fhira zwinwe.
Nga miṅwaha ya vho-1800, Vhaeuropa vha ambadza ludzunzu ulu nga luambo lwa saintsi.
Ludzunzu ulu lwa 'saintsi' lwo shumiswa u pfumbudza vhupika, muvhuso wa mavu na, nga murahu, u vhulahwa ha vhathu vhanzhi.

slides.notes: Fhambanyani zwavhuḓi vhukati ha manzwi mararu ane vhagudiswa vha sa faneli u a ṱanganya: mutupo (khethekanyo), ludzunzu lwa mutupo (sisiteme ya u kwevha nga ndondo), na ludzunzu lwa mutupo lwa saintsi/pseudo-saintsi (u lingedza u sumbedza ndondo yeneyo nga saintsi). Ombedzelani uri u vhidza mutupo 'tshivhumbiwa tsha matshilisano' a zwi ambi uri ludzunzu ndi lwa u humbulela fhedzi - mvelelo dzalwo ndi dza vhukuma na nga khwine. Vhewani ngani saintsi yo vha yo takadza zwigwada zwi re na maanḓa: yo ita uri u sa lingana zwi vhonale sa mupo hu si khetho.

slides.eyebrow: Midzi ya Enlightenment - ḓana ḽa vhu-18
slides.title: U kevha vhathu
slides.lead: Vhorasaintsi vha Europe vha thoma u kevha vhathu u vha mifuda yo dzudzanywaho - vha tshi kwevha nga tshiphiri.

blocks.text: Nga tshifhinga tsha Enlightenment, vhorasaintsi vho lingedza u kevha zwithu zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho. **Carl Linnaeus** (1735) na **Johann Blumenbach** (1795) vho kwevha vhathu u vha 'mifuda' i si minzhi, vha ḓisendeka nga muvhala wa lukanda na tshivhumbeo tsha khanda. Blumenbach o bveledza ipfi *Caucasian* nahone, nga ndeme, o vhea Vhaeuropa nṱhesa kha tshiṱaɖulo tshawe.

items: U kevha zwo vhonala hu na u sa dzhia sia, fhedzi zwo fhaṱa **ndondo** hu Vhaeuropa vha vha tsumbo ya vhudi.
Khethekanyo idzi dzo vhumbiwa nga tshifhinga tsha vhupika na u anda ha muvhuso wa mavu.
Vhahumbuli vha nga murahu vho dzhia mifuda iyi yo vhumbiwaho sa uri ndi yo dzudzanywaho na ya mupo.

media.alt: Mabogisi maṋa o ṅwaliwaho o dzudzanywaho sa phiramidi yo kwevhiwaho nga ndondo, u sumbedza khethekanyo dza mutupo dzo vhumbiwaho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='84' y='24' width='52' height='26' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='64' y='58' width='92' height='26' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='44' y='92' width='132' height='26' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='24' y='126' width='172' height='26' fill='#b7a98d'/><line x1='110' y1='18' x2='110' y2='152' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Itani uri tshiito tsho dzumbamaho tshi vhonale: u kevha (u kuvhanganya) zwo swikelela u kwevha nga ndondo hu si na vhuṱanzi ha yeneyo ndondo. Blumenbach ene muṋe o vha e si na ndondo nnzhi u fhira vhe vha mu shumisa, fhedzi vhatevheli vhawe vho khwaṱhisa khethekanyo dzawe - iyi ndi tsumbo yavhuḓi ya nḓila ye saintsi ya nga kombiwa ngayo u shumela lutshinyalo. [SME] Ṱolisisani ḓ eiti/vhaṋe (Linnaeus 1735 Systema Naturae; Blumenbach 1795 khanḓiso) nga khoni ya SAHO phanḓa ha u shumiswa.

slides.title: Ludzunzu lwa mutupo lwa saintsi
slides.lead: U ela khanda na mivhili u 'sumbedza' ndondo ye ya vha yo no ita mulanga u thoma.

blocks.text: Nga miṅwaha ya vho-1800, vharasidzunzu vho shumisa zwishumiswa zwi ngaho **craniometry** (u ela vhuhulwane ha khanda) na **phrenology** (u vhala thutha dza ṱhoho) u amba uri zwinwe zwigwada zwo vha na vhutali u fhira zwinwe. Ri vhidza hezwi **ludzunzu lwa mutupo lwa pseudo-saintsi** ngauri lwo shumisa *tshivhumbeo* tsha saintsi hu tshi hangwelwa maitele o teaho - vhaṱoli vho ṱoḓa vhuṱanzi ha u khwaṱhisa zwe vha vha vho no tenda.

items: Data yo nangwa, ya vhalwa nga u tshinyala kana ya vhumbiwa u tikedza vhudi ha Vhaeuropa.
Mvelelo (ndondo ya mutupo) yo dzhielwa phanḓa hu sa athu thoma 'ṱhoḓisiso'.
Zwo ṋea vhupika, u kunda ha vhukoloni na tsikeledzo tshiitisi tsho fanelaho, tsha 'saintsi'.

media.alt: Khanda tsho vhewaho tsini na zwishumiswa zwa u ela na ruḽara.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 46 q40 -20 66 8 q20 22 6 50 q-6 12 -22 12 h-8 v14 h-14 v-14 h-10 q-20 0 -26 -22 q-8 -30 8 -48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='84' cy='78' r='8' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='110' cy='80' r='7' fill='#5c1414'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='188' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='188' y2='30' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ombedzelani thaidzo ya maitele, ngauri ndi mbilu ya muhumbulo: pseudo-saintsi i shandukisa maitele a saintsi nga u thoma nga phindulo na u ṱoḓa thikhedzo. Craniometry (sa tsumbo, mavhulungano a khanda a vhaṱoli vha ngaho Samuel Morton) nga murahu yo sumbedziwa i na tshiṱalula na vhukhakhi. Ṱ anganyisani na luso lwa FET lwa u ṱ ola u fulufhedzea ha zwiko - vhenevha vho vha 'vhaḓivhi' vhe vhulanga havho ha shumiswa nga u tshinyala.

slides.eyebrow: U shumisa Darwin luvhi - u bva 1859
slides.title: Social Darwinism
slides.lead: U shandukisa thiori nga ha mupo u vha tshiitisi tsha tshiṱuhu tsha vhathu.

blocks.text: Bugu ya Charles Darwin ya *On the Origin of Species* (1859) yo ṱalutshedza nḓila ine mifuda ya shanduka ngayo nga u nanga ha mupo. Vhaṅwe - nga maanḓa **Herbert Spencer**, we a bveledza mubulo *survival of the fittest* - vho zwi shumisa nga u tshinyala kha zwitshavha zwa vhathu. **Social Darwinism** yo amba uri mashango a pfumaho, zwigwada na 'mitupo' zwo vha na maanḓa ngauri zwo vha na vhudi ha mupo.

items: Yo sumbedza u sa lingana na vhushai sa mupo na tsha ndeme.
Yo pfumbudza vhukoloni: u kunda ho vhewa sa 'vha vha maanḓa' vha tshi kunda 'vha songo khwaṱhaho'.
Biology ya Darwin yo tshinyadzwa; ene ho ngo amba uri zwinwe zwitshavha zwi fanela u vhusa zwinwe.

media.alt: Tshikepe tsha zwikwara zwi tshi gonya na muvhala, zwi sumbedza ḓ ala ya mazwifhi ya mvelaphanḓa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='116' width='36' height='28' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='66' y='96' width='36' height='48' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='108' y='72' width='36' height='72' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='150' y='44' width='36' height='100' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M30 108 L180 36' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M180 36 L168 40 M180 36 L176 50' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Vhani na vhuṱali kha vhagudiswa vha FET: Social Darwinism ndi u shumisa Darwin luvhi, a si mavhonele a Darwin ene muṋe (thangu ya tshiṱori tshine tsha ḓ oweleana). Spencer, hu si Darwin, o bveledza 'survival of the fittest'. Mushumo muhulwane wa muhumbulo wo vha wa ideoḽodzhi - wo ita uri u fhaṱa muvhuso wa mavu wa Europe na u sa lingana hu khomberaho zwi vhonale sa milayo ya mupo ine muthu a nga si i landule.

slides.title: Eugenics
slides.lead: Arali zwitshavha zwi tshi kona u ṱhora mavhele na kholomo dza khwiṋeho, vhaṅwe vho vhudzisa, ndi ngani ri sa vhumbi vhathu 'vha khwiṋeho'?

blocks.text: **Eugenics** (u bva kha Lugerika lu ambaho 'o bebwaho zwavhuḓi') o vhidzwa nga **Francis Galton**, muzwala wa Darwin, nga 1883. Yo lavhelesa u 'khwiṋisa' vhathu nga u ṱuṱuwedza 'vho teaho' u vha na vhana (*eugenics ya positive*) na u thivhela 'vha songo teaho' u ita nga uralo (*eugenics ya negative*) - nga tsikeledzo, u thivhela mbingano na u fadza vhana nga kombetshedzo.

items: 'Vha songo tea' vho ṱaliwa vha katela vhashai, vho holefhalaho, vha lwalaho ngiledzi na vhathu vha si vhatshena.
Yo shandukisa ludzunzu lwa mutupo lwa pseudo-saintsi u vha **mbekanyamaitele ya nyito ya muvhuso**.
Nga mathomo a vho-1900, eugenics yo vha yo ḓowelea na u ṱhonifhiwa Europe na USA.

media.alt: Muri wa muṱa wo ḓ oborwaho hune manṱha manwe o swaiwa na u tumulwa, u sumbedza u bebisa nga u nanga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='110' y1='140' x2='110' y2='70' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='60' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='160' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='104' x2='150' y2='96' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='60' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='154' cy='96' r='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><line x1='140' y1='82' x2='168' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='168' y1='82' x2='140' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Iyi ndi thiraidi ya u shandukisa: eugenics ndi hune mihumbulo ya khombo ya shanduka i vha mano a nyito ya muvhuso kha vhathu vha vhukuma. Ṱhogomelani uri eugenics yo vha i si tenda ḽa vhaṱuku - yo vha i tshi gudiswa yunivesithi khulwane na u tikedzwa nga vhorasaintsi vho ṱhonifhiwaho, vhopolotiki na vhareforma kha masia oṱhe a politiki. Yeneyo ṱhonifho ndi yone ye ya i ita ya vha na khombo lwo raloho. Sumbedzani uri sḽaidi mbili dzi tevhelaho dzi sumbedza eugenics i tshi vhewa mulayoni.

slides.title: Eugenics kha United States
slides.lead: Amerika ndi shango ḽa u thoma u shandukisa eugenics u vha mbekanyamaitele khulwane ya muvhuso.

blocks.text: U bva 1907, mavundu a USA o vhea milayo ya u **fadza vhathu nga kombetshedzo** vhe vha ṱaliwa 'vha songo tea'. Kha mulandu wa 1927 wa *Buck v. Bell*, Khoṱhe Khulwanesa yo tenda u fadza, hu Muhaṱuli Oliver Wendell Holmes a tshi ṅwala mubulo wo ḓ divheaho, 'Masiandaitwa mararu a vhathu vha si na ṱhalukanyo ndi o eḓana.' Zwigidi zwa Vhaamerika zwo fadzwa hu sa athu tenderwa, nahone Mulayo wa Vhupfumi ha vhabvannḓa wa 1924 wo shumisa muhumbulo wa eugenics u thivhela zwigwada 'zwi songo takadzaho'.

items: Vha tsikeledzwaho vho vha vhanzhi vha shai, vho holefhalaho na vha zwigwada zwiṱuku.
Eugenics ya USA yo ṋewa masheleni, ya dzudzanywa na u ṱhonifhiwa dzitshakani.
Vhorasaintsi vha mutupo vha Germany vho guda milayo ya Amerika zwavhuḓi sa tsumbo.

media.alt: Hamela ya muhaṱuli yo awelaho kha luṅwalo lwo swaiwaho nga tshiswayo tshiswuku.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='48' y='70' width='90' height='70' fill='#fff' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='98' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='112' width='44' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='116' cy='126' r='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='44' height='18' rx='4' fill='#5c1414' transform='rotate(35 172 49)'/><rect x='150' y='58' width='10' height='40' rx='3' fill='#7a5a3a' transform='rotate(35 155 78)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Zwine wa fanela u zwi dzhia ndi uri ḓ ala i yaho kha zwikhakhathi zwa Nazi a yo ngo thoma Germany. USA, demokirasi, yo thoma mbekanyamaitele ya eugenics ya kombetshedzo, nahone vhaitamilayo vha Nazi vho amba khagala milayo ya Amerika musi vha tshi ṅwala ya vhone. Farani mubulo wa Buck v. Bell nga vhuṱali - u vhidze sa ngoho ya ḓivhazwakale i shonisaho, hu si tsotso ya u dovholola. [SME] Khwaṱhisedzani zwibalo zwa u fadza (zwi ambiwaho zwi fhira 60,000 kha ḓana ḽa vhu-20) na khambiso ya mulayo wa u thoma wa 1907 wa Indiana nga khoni ya SAHO phanḓa ha u shumiswa.

slides.title: Vhukoloni na u vhulahwa ha Vhaherero na Vhanama
slides.lead: Kha German South West Africa (ṋamusi ndi Namibia), mihumbulo ya mutupo yo bveledza tshe vhanzhi vha tshi vhidza u vhulahwa ha vhathu ha u thoma kha ḓana ḽa vhu-20.

blocks.text: Musi zwitshavha zwa **Herero** na **Nama** zwi tshi vukela vhuvhusi ha vhukoloni ha Germany, Dzhenerala **Lothar von Trotha** o ṋekedza ndaela ya u lozwa (1904). Vho salaho vho pandelwa sogani kana kha mavhulungano a vhungwadani, hune zwigidi zwa fela. Khanda dza vho faho dzo rumelwa Germany u itela u shumiswa kha ṱhoḓisiso ya 'saintsi ya mutupo'.

items: Vharaḓivhazwakale vha kanela uri hu ṱ ata Vhaherero vha 65,000 na Vhanama vha 10,000 vho vhulahwa.
Thiori ya mutupo yo shandukisa u vhulaha vhanzhi u vha u bvisa ha mupo ha tshitshavha 'tsho fhelaho'.
Mihumbulo i fanaho ya mavhulungano na ndondo ya mutupo yo ḓ i dovha ya vhonala Europe nga miṅwaha ya nga murahu.

media.alt: Sia ḽa sogani ḽi konḓaho na ḓuvha ḽi re fhasi, u sumbedza sogani ḽa Namib.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 104 q60 -22 120 0 t120 0 v56 H0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><circle cx='170' cy='70' r='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M0 132 q80 -14 240 4 v24 H0 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sḽaidi iyi i ita uri mihumbulo i sa vhoneki i wanale kha khakhathi ya vhukuma i re na vhukwamani ha nnḓa na Afurika Tshipembe (Namibia yo vha i tshi langwa nga Afurika Tshipembe kha vhunzhi ha ḓana ḽa vhu-20). Ombedzelani ṱhoḓea i ofhisaho ya khanda dzo rumelwaho ṱhoḓisisoni ya mutupo - i sumbedza pseudo-saintsi na khakhathi khulwane zwi tshi fana. Sumbedzani mutalo wa u ḓ i sendedza wa Germany ya Nazi ni sa ṱanganyisi zwiitea zwenezwo zwivhili. [SME] Mubulo wa 'u vhulahwa ha vhathu ha u thoma kha ḓana ḽa vhu-20' na zwibalo zwa vho faho zwi shumiswa vhukuma fhedzi zwi na khani; khwaṱhisedzani nga khoni ya SAHO ya Herero Revolt.

slides.eyebrow: Muvhuso wa mutupo - Germany ya Nazi
slides.title: 'Mutupo mulanguli' wa Nazi
slides.lead: Vha-Nazi vho fhaṱa muvhuso woṱhe nga pseudo-saintsi ya mutupo mulanguli wa 'Aryan'.

blocks.text: Nga murahu ha 1933, Germany ya Nazi yo ita uri ndondo ya mutupo i vhe mutheo wa mulayo. Vho vhumba mutupo mulanguli wa **Aryan** (*Herrenvolk*) nahone vha ṱalusa Vhajuda, Vharoma, Vhathu vhaswu na vhaṅwe sa 'maswina' a fhasi. **Milayo ya Nuremberg (1935)** yo dzhia vhudzulapo kha Vhajuda na u thivhela mbingano vhukati ha Vhajuda na vhaṅwe Vhagermany - i tshi shandukisa ludzunzu lwa mutupo lwa pseudo-saintsi u vha sisiteme ya mulayo ya u thivhela.

items: Mulayo wa 1933 wo tendela u fadza nga kombetshedzo ha 'vho songo teaho nga lupfumo', zwi tshi edzisa eugenics ya USA.
Phropaganda, zwikolo na saintsi zwoṱhe zwo guda ndondo ya mutupo sa ngoho.
U thivhela ho engedzea tshiḽaḓana nga tshiḽaḓana: u bva kha vhudzulapo, kha thundu, u swika kha vhutshilo vhuṋe.

media.alt: Luṅwalo lwa muvhuso lwo swaiwaho lwa kanana kavhili, u sumbedza vhudzulapo ho bviswaho nga mulayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='118' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='60' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='72' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M104 30 L112 60 L104 90 L112 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M118 30 L110 60 L118 90 L110 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sumbedzani vhagudiswa maitele ane thero ya CAPS i ṱoḓa uri vha a pfese: mihumbulo ya mutupo i tshi vha 'ya ndeme kha mbekanyamaitele na milayo ya muvhuso'. Milayo ya Nuremberg ndi tsumbo yo tou vhalaho - mulayo u tshi ṱalusa uri ndi nnyi a re muthu wa vhukuma. Sumbedzani ḓ ala i yaho khagala u bva kha sḽaidi ya eugenics ya USA: mulayo wa u fadza wa Germany wa 1933 wo edziswa nga milayo ya Amerika. Ombedzelani u anda ha tsikeledzo nga zwiḽaḓana - a yo ngo thoma nga u vhulaha, yo thoma nga maṅwalwa.

slides.title: Holocaust
slides.lead: Ideoḽodzhi ya mutupo yo swikela nṱhesa nga u vhulahwa ha zwigidi zwa vhathu nga u dzudzanya na nga inḓasiṱiri.

blocks.text: Nga tshifhinga tsha Nndwa ya Vhuvhili ya Shango muvhuso wa Nazi wo ita **Holocaust** - u vhulahwa ho dzudzanywaho, ha vhukuma ha ṱ ata Vhajuda vha **milioni ya rathi**, khathihi na Vharoma, vho holefhalaho, maswina a politiki na vhaṅwe vhe vha ṱaliwa 'vha songo faneli vhutshilo'. Iyi yo vha vhufhelo vhu ofhisaho ha ḓana ḽa mihumbulo ya mutupo ye ya kwevha vhathu nga ndondo ya dovha ya ita nga yeneyo ndondo.

items: Vho holefhalaho vho vha kha vha u thoma u vhulahwa, nga mbekanyamaitele ya 'euthanasia' ya u thoma.
Zwa muvhuso, saintsi na thekhinoḽodzhi zwo shumiswa u vhulaha nga inḓasiṱiri.
Holocaust i ima sa tsevho khulwanesa ya hune mihumbulo ya mutupo i nga isa hone.

media.alt: Kherese nthihi yo bvulelaho kha vhuswiswi, tshiga tsha tshihumbudzo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#2b2b2b'/><rect x='88' y='72' width='24' height='60' rx='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='96' y='58' width='8' height='16' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M100 22 q14 20 0 36 q-14 -16 0 -36 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M100 34 q7 10 0 20 q-7 -10 0 -20 Z' fill='#fff4d6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Iyi ndi sḽaidi ya ṱhoḓea khulwane - i fareni nga u ṱhonifha na nga ṱhogomelo. Vhewani ṱhogomelo kha khombo kha vhathu na kha u humbula, hu si kha zwiṱhavhi zwi ofhisaho. Itani mbuno ya u ṱ ola uri Holocaust yo vha i si u penga ho ḓ isaho, fhedzi vhufhelo vhu ofhisaho ha mihumbulo ye vhagudiswa vha i tevhela ngudo yoṱhe: u kevha, ndondo, u dzhielwa vhumuthu, u thivhelwa, na u lozwa. Ṱhogomelani nyendedzo ya SAHO nga Holocaust ni ṱanganyise na pfanelo dza vhathu dzo bvaho nga murahu (Nyimelo ya Shango ya Pfanelo dza Vhathu ya 1948 na ipfi 'genocide').

slides.eyebrow: U ḓ isa hayani - Afurika Tshipembe
slides.title: Mihumbulo ya mutupo na Afurika Tshipembe
slides.lead: Mikhumbulo i fanaho ya mutupo yo vhumba tsikeledzo na apartheid hayani.

blocks.text: Afurika Tshipembe yo vha tshipiḓa tsha tshiṱori tsha shango tshenetshi. Mivhuso ya vhukoloni na ya vhadzulapo vho shumisa mihumbulo i fanaho ya pseudo-saintsi u pfumbudza u kunda, u dzhielwa mavu na tsikeledzo. Nga murahu ha 1948, **apartheid** yo fhaṱa sisiteme yoṱhe ya mulayo nga khethekanyo ya mutupo - zwi tou vhonala kha **Mulayo wa Ndanganyiso ya Vhadzulapo wa 1950**, we wa kevha muthu muṅwe na muṅwe u vha 'mutupo' wa muvhuso.

items: Vharaḓivhazwakale vha kanzhi vha vhambedza milayo ya u thoma ya apartheid na milayo ya mutupo ya Nazi.
Kha zwoṱhe zwivhili, muvhuso, hu si biology, ndi wo ne wa dzhia tsheo ya uri ndi nnyi a re wa mutupo ufhio.
U pfesesa saintsi ya mazwifhi ya mutupo zwi thusa u ṱalutshedza ngani apartheid i si na vhulungo mutheoni wayo.

media.alt: Bugu ya vhuṱanzi ha vhuṋe yo swaiwaho nga khethekanyo, u sumbedza khethekanyo ya mutupo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 160' role='img'><rect width='180' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='45' y='24' width='90' height='112' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='56' y='38' width='34' height='40' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='73' cy='54' r='9' fill='#9aa77f'/><path d='M60 74 q13 -14 26 0 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect x='96' y='42' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='96' y='54' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='56' y='92' width='68' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='56' y='116' width='52' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Vhewani ndeme ya thero kha vhagudiswa vha Afurika Tshipembe: mihumbulo yo gudwaho hafha yo vha i si thaidzo ya Europe fhedzi, yo shumiswa u fhaṱa tsikeledzo na apartheid hayani. Itani mutalo wa vhuṱali na Germany ya Nazi (zwoṱhe zwivhili zwo shumisa khethekanyo ya muvhuso) ni tshi ṱhogomela phambano - apartheid yo lavhelesa u shumisa na u fhambanya hu si u lozwa. Hezwi zwi ṱanganyisa na yunithi dza apartheid dza Giredi ya vhu-11 na ya vhu-12.

slides.title: U bva kha u kevha u swika kha khombo

blocks.alt: Ndondo ya tshifhinga ya mveledziso ya mihumbulo ya mutupo u bva 1735 u swika 1950.

events.label: Darwin u ganḓisa On the Origin of Species
U vhulahwa ha Vhaherero na Vhanama zwa thoma
US Buck v. Bell i tendela u fadza nga kombetshedzo
Milayo ya khethekanyo ya apartheid Afurika Tshipembe

slides.notes: Shumisani ndondo ya tshifhinga u khwaṱhisa thero sa tshiṱumbo tsha tshiitisi na mvelelo: muhumbulo (u kevha) u khwaṱha u vha pseudo-saintsi (Social Darwinism, eugenics), we wa ṅwaliwa mulayoni (US, Germany ya Nazi, Afurika Tshipembe) wa itwa sa khakhathi (u vhulahwa ha vhathu nga vhukoloni, Holocaust). Vhudzisani vhagudiswa uri vha ṱ ale zwiitea zwifhio ndi 'mihumbulo', zwifhio ndi 'milayo' na zwifhio ndi 'khakhathi' - u khwaṱhisa muvhumbo muhulwane wa thero phanḓa ha mbudziso dza u vusulusa.

slides.title: Zwe ra guda
slides.lead: Mihumbulo i na maanḓa: saintsi ya mazwifhi ya mutupo, musi yo no tendwa na u vhewa mulayoni, yo dzhia vhutshilo ha zwigidi zwa milioni.

blocks.text: Kha ngudo iyi ro tevhela nḓila ye 'mutupo' wa **vhumbiwa, hu si u wanwa**; nḓila ye pseudo-saintsi (Social Darwinism na eugenics) ya ṋea ludzunzu lwa mutupo tshiofho tshi ṱhonifheaho; na nḓila ye, musi mivhuso i tshi ṅwala mihumbulo iyi **mulayoni**, mvelelo dza vha u bva kha u fadza nga kombetshedzo u swika kha u vhulahwa ha vhathu nga vhukoloni na Holocaust. U guda ḓivhazwakale iyi ndi tsevho nga ha khombo ya mihumbulo i dzhielaho vhathu vhumuthu - na tsireledzo ya pfanelo na tshirunzi tsha muthu.

blocks.label: Q1
blocks.question: Ṱalutshedzani ngani vharaḓivhazwakale vha tshi vhidza saintsi ya mutupo ya ḓana ḽa vhu-19 'pseudo-saintsi'. Ambelani nḓila ye mvelelo dza swikelelwa ngayo.

blocks.label: Q2
blocks.question: 'Mihumbulo ya mutupo yo tou vha na khombo ya vhukuma musi mivhuso i tshi i shandukisa u vha mulayo.' Ni a tenda? Shumisani tsumbo mbili u bva kha ngudo iyi u tikedza phindulo yaṋu.

blocks.label: Q3
blocks.question: Vhambedzani nḓila ye mutupo wo shumiswa ngayo Germany ya Nazi na Afurika Tshipembe ya apartheid. Ṱ alani u fana huthihi na phambano nthihi.

slides.notes: Fhedzisani nga u humela kha mbuno ya u thoma - mutupo ndi tshivhumbiwa tsha matshilisano tshi re na mvelelo dza vhukuma dzo tshinyalaho - na nga u khwaṱhisa phindulo ya pfanelo dza vhathu dzo tevhelaho 1945. Shumisani mbudziso tharu sa ndingo yo ṅwaliwaho kana khaseledzo yo dzudzanywaho; ndondo dza marikisi dzi tevhela sitaela dza CAPS dza u ṅwala ho engedzeaho na u vhambedza zwiko (Q2 ndi phara/rukhindo luṱuku; Q3 i shumisa luso lwa u vhambedza lu ṱoḓiwaho nga thero). Humbudzani vhagudiswa uri thero iyi ndi mutheo wa yunithi dza apartheid na pfanelo dza vhathu dza nga murahu.
